The '''Meris''' were a tall [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] race with [[Color/Legends|dark blue]] skin, similar to the [[Teltior]]s, with whom they shared the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Merisee/Legends|Merisee]]. Distinguishing features included a strongly-pronounced eyebrow ridge, a slightly conical ridge on the top of their head, webbed hands with an opposable thumb and finger, inward-spiraling cartilage in the [[Ear/Legends|ear]], and several thick folds of skin around the neck.

Some Meris were associated with the [[Cult of Those Who Redeem]], though others were part of the [[Loag]] cult of [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]].
